skills.name: Deep Straight
skills.description: Impales the enemy on a sword before delivering a powerful kick.

skills.name: Earth Tremor
skills.description: Plunges sword into enemy while airborne.

skills.name: Penta-Train
skills.description: A series of aggressive attacks that pushes the enemy back.

skills.name: Vortex Slash
skills.description: Make a series of fast and powerful attacks.

skills.name: Hexen Dropper
skills.description: Slashes mercilessly with a set of double swords.

skills.name: Dust Devil
skills.description: Kicks up a vicious dust storm that envelops enemies in the vicinity.
skills.target: Up to 5 Enemies within a range of 2.5m

skills.name: Bane of Gladiator
skills.description: Pierces the enemy and then strikes at his head.

skills.name: Violent Shooting Star
skills.description: Stabs abdomen of enemy many times with a crazy speed.

skills.name: Slash Down
skills.description: Delivers downward slashes.

skills.name: Guardian
skills.description: Focuses on Blocking to improve DEF. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Pommel
skills.description: Strike the head of enemy with the pommel of sword repeatedly. It overwhelms the DEF of small or medium enemies, but is ineffective on large enemies.

skills.name: Stunning Skewer
skills.description: Stuns the enemy with a blow from the shield before advancing upon him with a sword.

stances.name: Crusader

skills.name: The Sieger
skills.description: Reduces Knockdown time by lowering body. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Temple Breaker
skills.description: Hold the weapon with two hands and swing it horizontally.

skills.name: Defiant Aura
skills.description: Damages surrounding enemies by releasing the collected energy.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Atomic Slash
skills.description: Strike down enemy with 5 strong attacks.

skills.name: Sacred Protection
skills.description: Adds the holy energy to the shield to increase DEF to Max. But, Movement Speed decreases. Cant use skill. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Pistol Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 times consecutively with the pistol in the left hand. This can be used as a normal attack.

skills.name: Slash Down
skills.description: Delivers downward slashes.

skills.name: Deadly Infinitum
skills.description: Slashes enemies mercilessly before finishing him off with a shot.

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Swings a sabre in a powerful whirling motion.

skills.name: Into The Hell
skills.description: Fires a series of pistol shots at an enemy and advance upon him with a blade.

skills.name: Fente
skills.description: A lightning-quick attack that takes enemies by surprise and pierces him deeply. It has a longer range than other stabbing attacks.

skills.name: Sept Etoiles
skills.description: Rapidly pierces enemies and forces him to retreat.

skills.description: An advanced form of the Fente, accompanied by a surprising leap and powerful lunge.
skills.target: Up to 3 enemies 5.5m away and within 3m width

skills.description: Attacks enemies with a series of violent piercing movements.

skills.name: Tete
skills.description: Strikes enemies with the sword hilt before delivering a damaging slash.

skills.name: Evasion
skills.description: Increases Evasion for a while. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Attaque Compose
skills.description: A rapid series of merciless slashes.

skills.name: Esquive Touch
skills.description: A series of rapid slashes followed by a powerful stab to finish enemies off.

skills.name: Fente
skills.description: A lightning-quick attack that takes enemies by surprise and pierces him deeply. It has a longer range than other stabbing attacks.

skills.description: Stabs and slashes enemies alternately with a dagger and a rapier.

skills.description: Slashes mercilessly with a set of double swords.

skills.name: Skyliner

skills.name: Fury
skills.description: Maximises Attack SPD by using whole bodys energy. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Sweet Dreamer

skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within 3m width

skills.description: Advances upon enemies with 7 consecutive slashes.

skills.name: Fury
skills.description: Maximises Attack SPD by using whole bodys energy. Canceled, if Stance changes.
